parameters.command: powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "$services = @('RustDesk','Tailscale'); $results = @(); foreach ($svc in $services) { $s = Get-Service -Name $svc -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($s) { $results += @{Name=$svc; Status=$s.Status.ToString()} } else { $results += @{Name=$svc; Status='NotFound'} } }; $results | ConvertTo-Json -Compress"

powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:11434/api/tags' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; @{Status='Running'; Models=($r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json).models.name} | ConvertTo-Json -Compress } catch { @{Status='Down'; Error=$_.Exception.Message} | ConvertTo-Json -Compress }"

powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "$cpu = (Get-CimInstance Win32_Processor | Measure-Object -Property LoadPercentage -Average).Average; $os = Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem; $ramTotal = [math]::Round($os.TotalVisibleMemorySize/1048576,1); $ramFree = [math]::Round($os.FreePhysicalMemory/1048576,1); $ramUsed = $ramTotal - $ramFree; $disk = Get-CimInstance Win32_LogicalDisk -Filter \"DeviceID='C:'\"; $diskTotal = [math]::Round($disk.Size/1073741824,1); $diskFree = [math]::Round($disk.FreeSpace/1073741824,1); $diskPct = [math]::Round(($disk.Size - $disk.FreeSpace)/$disk.Size*100,1); $uptime = (Get-Date) - $os.LastBootUpTime; @{CPU=$cpu; RAM_GB=@{Total=$ramTotal;Used=$ramUsed;Free=$ramFree}; Disk_GB=@{Total=$diskTotal;Free=$diskFree;UsedPct=$diskPct}; Uptime=$uptime.ToString('d\.hh\:mm\:ss')} | ConvertTo-Json -Compress"

powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "$services = @('RustDesk','Tailscale'); foreach ($svc in $services) { $s = Get-Service -Name $svc -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($s -and $s.Status -ne 'Running') { Write-Output \"Restarting $svc...\"; Start-Service -Name $svc -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $s2 = Get-Service -Name $svc; Write-Output \"$svc is now $($s2.Status)\" } }"

powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "Write-Output 'Cleaning temp files...'; $before = (Get-CimInstance Win32_LogicalDisk -Filter \"DeviceID='C:'\").FreeSpace; Remove-Item -Path \"$env:TEMP\*\" -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item -Path 'C:\Windows\Temp\*' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $after = (Get-CimInstance Win32_LogicalDisk -Filter \"DeviceID='C:'\").FreeSpace; $freed = [math]::Round(($after - $before)/1048576, 1); Write-Output \"Freed: ${freed} MB\""
